description_long: This radiator features a rectangular, flat panel design with a prominent geometric grille on its front face. The grille consists of a series of nested, angular black bars forming a stepped, labyrinthine pattern, which serves both as a decorative element and as a heat-dissipating surface. The main body is a solid, light-colored slab, likely made of metal, with a smooth, matte finish. The radiator is relatively thin in profile, with the grille protruding slightly from the main panel. No visible controls or valves are present on the exterior, suggesting a minimalist, modern aesthetic. The back is plain and unadorned, indicating it is intended to be mounted flush against a wall.
description: A modern, rectangular radiator with a stepped geometric black grille on a smooth, light-colored panel. The design is sleek and minimalist, with a thin profile and decorative front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full geometric grille pattern and the light-colored panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the radiator's thin profile and the slight protrusion of the grille.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned surface with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and grille depth.
attribute_pipe_connections: none visible; likely rear or bottom entry, not exposed
attribute_fin_arrangement: serpentine grille pattern on front panel
attribute_grille_pattern: stepped, nested rectangular bars forming a geometric labyrinthine pattern
